About this item

Experience premium sound quality with the BX-400 wireless headphones. Engineered with custom 40mm drivers and advanced noise cancellation technology, these headphones deliver studio-quality audio whether you're commuting, working, or relaxing at home.

The ergonomic over-ear design with memory foam cushions provides all-day comfort, while the foldable structure makes them easy to pack for travel.

Technical Specifications

BrandSoundCore Audio
ModelBX-400
ConnectivityBluetooth 5.3
Battery Life30 hours
Driver Size40mm
Weight254g
Noise CancellationActive (3 levels)

Customer Reviews

4.3 out of 5 1,247 global ratings
Michael T. 5.0 February 14, 2025

Best headphones in this price range

I've tried several wireless headphones under $100 and these are by far the best. The noise cancellation is surprisingly effective for the price, and the battery easily lasts through a full week of commuting. Sound quality is balanced with punchy bass that doesn't overpower mids and highs.

42 people found this helpful
Sarah K. 4.0 January 28, 2025

Great sound, minor comfort issue

Sound quality and ANC are excellent. My only complaint is that after about 3 hours of continuous use, the clamp force on my larger head gets a bit uncomfortable. Stretching them out over a box for a day helped. Otherwise a fantastic value.

18 people found this helpful
James R. 3.5 January 15, 2025

Good but microphone could be better

As listening headphones these are great. However, the microphone quality for calls is just average. People on the other end say I sound slightly muffled. Fine for music and podcasts, but if calls are your primary use case, consider something else.

9 people found this helpful
